ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subscription_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan (e.g., Starter, Standard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subscription plan's offerings */,
  "monthly_cost" REAL /* Monthly cost of the subscription plan */,
  "trial_period" INTEGER /* The number of days for the trial period */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* The policy for canceling a subscription plan */,
  "refund_policy" TEXT /* The policy for refunding a subscription plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Guest Posting, Article Submission) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature's purpose and value */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* The type of feature (e.g., guest posting, article submission) */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for using the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_features" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription plan */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature included in the plan */,
  "limit" INTEGER /* Limit on the number of submissions for this feature */,
  "additional_cost" REAL /* Any additional cost for the feature beyond the monthly plan cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client or business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription plan chosen by the client */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* The date the client registered for the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the client's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The client's payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES subscription_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the submission */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being submitted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the submission was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the submission (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "submission_title" TEXT /* The title of the submission */,
  "submission_content" TEXT /* The content of the submission */,
  "submission_status_date" TEXT /* The date the submission status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* The date the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* The client's rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* The client's comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_feedback_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission being tracked */,
  "engagement" INTEGER /* The engagement generated by the submission (e.g., likes, shares) */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* The reach of the submission (e.g., views, impressions) */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date the analytics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_analytics_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)
